title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 41.120 - Governor, commander in chief of militia
text:
41.120.  Governor, commander in chief of militia. — The governor of the state, by virtue of his office, is the commander in chief of the militia of the state, except such portion thereof as may at times be in the service of the United States.
(RSMo 1939 § 15015, A.L. 1951 p. 654 § 9) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13822; 1919 § 7350
